name: wire-design-system
description: A grayscale wireframe and mid-fidelity component system. No build step required for the runtime; tooling here is opt-in for validation.

scripts.validate: npm run a11y && npm run lh
scripts.bundle:
node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const css=p.join(__dirname,'css');const files=['tokens.css','reset.css','base.css','layout.css','utilities.css',...fs.readdirSync(p.join(css,'components')).map(f=>'components/'+f),'print.css'];const out=files.map(f=>'/* === '+f+' === */
'+fs.readFileSync(p.join(css,f),'utf8').replace(/@import[^;]+;/g,'')).join('

');fs.mkdirSync(p.join(__dirname,'dist'),{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync(p.join(__dirname,'dist','wire.bundle.css'),out);console.log('Wrote dist/wire.bundle.css ('+out.length+' bytes)');"
